description: Covers the minimum engine backbone validation scenario.
Covers long-range parabola hit behavior.
Validates that hit height bands block low projectiles while allowing elevated projectiles to resolve against elevated targets.
Validates that crossing projected paths do not cause off-lane interception during parabola flight.
Validates that high-speed linear projectiles still register hits through swept-segment collision instead of skipping through targets.
Validates that terminal-hit projectiles can drive explode-tagged area damage at their impact point.
Validates the first Mechanic-first skeleton path from archetype resolution to compiled RuntimeTriggerSpec execution.
Validates the first attack-side Mechanic-first skeleton path from archetype resolution to compiled RuntimeTriggerSpec damage execution.
Validates the first projectile-side Mechanic-first skeleton path for linear and parabola projectile attacks.
Validates the second-stage lifecycle path for on_spawned mechanics compiled into shared runtime triggers.
Validates the second-stage on_place lifecycle path through the card and placement runtime.
Validates the third-stage state path for arming -> active gating before shared runtime damage begins.
Negative validation for required_state gating before the active state is reached.
Validates that unknown projectile movement ids are reported through protocol issues and safely fall back.
Validates that a zombie archetype can enter through archetype_id and still reuse the existing continuous bite runtime.
Validates that an archetype-backed lawn mower field object uses the new sweep controller path.
Validates that a lawn mower does not activate until an enemy enters contact range.
Validates that a lawn mower does not activate on nearby non-zombie entities.
Validates that a single trigger mechanic compiles and executes multiple payload mechanics independently.
Validates that an independent Targeting mechanic compiles into trigger condition_values and enables correct detection.
Validates that an independent Trajectory mechanic injects movement_mode into effect_params.
Validates that an independent HitPolicy mechanic injects hit_strategy into effect_params.
Validates that an independent Emission burst mechanic spawns multiple projectiles per trigger.
Validates that an independent Emission spread mechanic spawns fan-pattern projectiles.
Validates that an archetype with all 6 attack-chain family mechanics compiles and executes correctly.
Validates that a Placement mechanic archetype compiles placement_spec metadata and can be placed on a ground slot.
Validates that BattleCardState and BattleBoardState consume compiled placement_spec values, including placement_role overrides and required_present_roles.
Validates that archetype field placement data is normalized into placement_spec_source=archetype_field and consumed by the shared placement runtime.
Validates that multiple enabled Placement mechanics are rejected before runtime spawn.
Validates that BattleSpawnEntry can resolve archetypes by registry id and that scene-level overrides win over template projectile defaults.
Validates simulation speed, pause-on-start, and headless fixed-step controls for the 100Hz gameplay clock.
Validates that the air interceptor sample can hit low and medium air targets through the shared projectile content chain.
Validates that the repeater burst sample can spawn repeated projectiles and damage walker and runner targets in two lanes.
Validates that cabbage and melon lobber samples can spawn their dedicated projectile templates and resolve direct-hit and explode-tagged damage.
Validates that the new zombie roster samples can all attack the wall barrier sample through the common zombie runtime.
Validates the first formal v1 plant roster additions for control and summon roles through shared built-in runtime effects.
Validates the first formal v1 zombie roster additions for ranged special attack and support disruption.
Validates the first formal v1 interaction matrix across control, summon pressure, armored resistance and ranged disruption.
Validates formal battlefield presets by exercising water, ground and air-only placement semantics through the shared card and board runtime.
Validates the survive_duration battle goal variant without introducing battle-specific special cases.
Validates the protect_archetype defeat condition by requiring a sunflower anchor to survive a ranged zombie attack.
Validates that invalid protocol content, including unsupported target modes, is rejected through protocol.issue events before projectile or damage execution can continue.
Validates consume_self owner guardrails and reveal enemy-hidden target filtering.
Validates the first-stage sun economy loop, including plant-generated and sky-drop sun, automatic collection, and spend failure/success resource events.

Validates sunflower sun production using the actual archetype_sunflower archetype across multiple lanes, including plant-generated sun with different intervals and values, sky-drop sun, automatic collection, and resource state changes.
Validates the first-stage card runtime, including sun spending via try_spend_sun, placement acceptance, entity spawn, cooldown rejection, and insufficient-resource rejection.
Validates a data-driven card placement request through the shared card, board, and archetype runtime.
Validates the formal board placement layer by accepting one legal slot request and rejecting a second request into the occupied slot.
Validates that the formal board layer owns slot types and placement tags, rejecting mismatched requests and accepting matched ones.
Validates that empty lane_configs keep the legacy all-ground board behavior.
Validates lane type template expansion for grass and pool rows.
Validates that dirt lanes expose no placement tags and reject ordinary ground placement.
Validates that explicit lane_y_positions drive board metrics and slot positions.
Validates that lane_configs alone keep legacy wave spawning for existing zombies without spawn.medium tags.
Validates that linear terrain profiles drive BattlefieldMetrics slot positions and elevation samples.
Validates that stepped terrain profiles drive BattlefieldMetrics slot positions and elevation samples.
Validates terrain-follow projectile hit checks using absolute z on sloped terrain.
Validates spawn zone resolution by zombie spawn.medium tags for ground and water lanes.
Validates that spawn zones referencing invalid lanes emit protocol issues.
Validates that strict spawn zone scenarios reject zombies without spawn.medium requirements.
Validates that roof slots require a surface container before a primary plant can be placed.
Validates that air-only slots reject unsupported archetypes and accept a template with matching static air-only constraints.
Validates cover and blocker role semantics, including cover stacking on primary and blocker exclusion.
Validates the first-stage status system through slowed and stunned examples that affect movement and attack.
Validates state and status liveness overrides for arming, sleeping and stunned entities.
Validates SpatialIndex query results against full-scan baselines for lane/team/x, tag/kind, height_range and stable ordering.
Validates that tick budget monitoring emits simulation.control metadata when the configured threshold is crossed.
Validates the first-stage field object runtime through a lawn mower that activates, kills a zombie, and expires without triggering defeat.
Validates the first GridItem slice through a crater that blocks placement, is removed by effect, and then allows placement.
Validates the first-stage battle flow, including phase changes, wave start/completion, wave spawns, and battle victory.
Validates that invalid wave definitions emit protocol issues and do not continue into wave-based spawns.
Validates that repeated burst fire can drive a reactive counterattack chain through the shared runtime.
Validates that a reactive bomber death explosion can damage multiple nearby plants through the shared explode chain.
Validates that ground and air tracking attackers can coexist as a fifth-stage chaos sample without new battle-specific scripts.
Validates that a minimal external content pack can register an archetype and validation scenario through the extension scan path.
Validates extension-registered projectile movement and mechanic compiler dispatch through my_pack.zigzag.
Validates extension manifest guardrails during extension pack scan, including malformed manifests and private asset publication boundaries.
Validates that data_only extension packs cannot register trusted runtime slots.
Validates runtime slot guardrails for invalid projectile movement scripts and mechanic compiler contributions.
Validates the first-stage lane_forward detection gate, including same-lane firing, adjacent-lane rejection, and RuleContext target propagation for parabola targeting.
Validates a cascading death-explosion chain where two reactive bombers trigger sequential on_death explosions through spatial proximity.
Validates that a melon lobber terminal explosion can simultaneously damage a tank and a nearby walker through the shared on_hit explode runtime.
Validates that ground tracking projectiles can reliably pursue and hit a fast-moving brisk runner through the shared tracking runtime.
Validates that when_damaged retaliation correctly targets the event source in each lane without cross-lane interference.
Validates that BattleModeHost resolves a mode, forwards events into rule modules, and lets objective evaluation mark battle victory.
Validates the pilot manual aim mode by selecting a spawned entity, targeting a board slot, and resolving a manual skill through the mode layer.
Validates that a mode input profile can disable entity selection and manual skill resolution without breaking standard placement.
Validates score-threshold objective progression across multiple manual skill applications.
Validates mode-level protect_archetype objective evaluation and defeat handling.
Validates mode-level clear_special_targets objective evaluation and victory handling.
Validates mode-level defeat_named_spawn objective evaluation and victory handling.
Validates that scenario-level mode_rule_modules override default mode_def modules by module_id.
Validates the minimal conveyor_cards module path through the shared mode host.
Validates that battles without mode_def still work correctly - backward compatibility guardrail.
Validates that invalid BattleModeDef, BattleInputProfile, BattleObjectiveDef, and BattleRuleModule resources are rejected through battle_scenario protocol issues.

Validates all 7 Batch A original PVZ plants: Peashooter (damage), Sunflower (sun production), Wall-nut (tank damage), Snow Pea (slow status), Repeater (burst damage), Cabbage-pult (lob hit), Melon-pult (splash explode).
Validates Batch B original PVZ plants: Cherry Bomb (on_place explode), Jalapeno (lane explosion), Tall-nut (tank damage), Pumpkin (cover spawn).
Validates Potato Mine arming state and active proximity explosion.
Validates Squash on-place proximity damage.
Validates Chomper close-range devour damage.
Validates Round 1 protocol extensions: enemies_in_lane explode, dispel_flying, radius_around targeting, global_track targeting, metal tag filtering, and upgrade placement.
Validates Batch C night mushrooms: Puff-shroom sleeping spawn, Fume-shroom wake and damage, Ice-shroom and Doom-shroom on_place explode.
Validates Coffee Bean wakes only its covered sleeping plant.
Validates Fume-shroom wake flow and pierce hit policy.
Validates Hypno-shroom wake flow and proximity team switch.
Validates Sun-shroom wake flow and delayed sun production.
Validates Scaredy-shroom wake flow and forward projectile damage.
Validates Scaredy-shroom near-enemy cower liveness and stop-fire behavior.
Validates Sea-shroom water placement, wake flow, and short-range damage.
Validates Batch D field and multi-directional plants: Threepeater multi-lane damage, Spikeweed ground_damage, Peashooter+Torchwood combo.
Validates Split Pea dual-direction emission.
Validates Starfruit multi-angle emission.
Validates Cactus air-target projectile path.
Validates Cactus split air and ground target projectile paths.
Validates Blover air-only dispel path.
Validates Magnet-shroom sleep/wake and metal-tag targeting.
Validates Grave Buster tombstone-dependent placement, rejection without a tombstone, and blocker removal.
Validates Lily Pad support placement and Sea-shroom primary placement on water slots.
Validates Tangle Kelp water placement, lethal proximity hit and self-consume, plus Plantern reveal against hidden enemies.
Validates Kernel-pult deterministic corn/butter cycle with damage and butter stun payloads.
Validates Marigold placement and coin-generated collectible production through the shared economy path.
Validates Batch E roof, upgrade and economy plants: Repeater damage, Sunflower sun production, Winter Melon splash damage, Flower Pot support spawn, and Marigold coin-generated collectible output.
Validates Flower Pot roof support placement and support-granted primary placement.
Validates E batch upgrade placement role and specific base archetype dependencies.
Validates Gloom-shroom upgrade placement and radius-based detected-target damage.
Validates Cattail water upgrade placement and current track-air projectile damage path.
Validates Cattail global tracking, air priority, and two-shot burst cadence.
Validates Winter Melon upgrade placement and terminal blast damage.
Validates Spikerock upgrade placement and ground damage controller behavior.
Validates Gold Magnet upgrade placement over Magnet-shroom.
Validates Cob Cannon two-Kernel-pult upgrade footprint and one manual aimed area-damage shot.
Validates generic entity.replaced semantics for card upgrades, multi-stage upgrades, and lifecycle-triggered automatic replacement.
Showcase validation for original shooter plants with per-plant damage checks.
Showcase validation for original frost/control plants across slow, air, water and upgrade contexts.
Showcase validation for original lobber plants with hit and splash checks.
Showcase validation for original production plants with sun, coin, wake and upgrade checks.
Showcase validation for original mushroom plants through wake, water and upgrade contexts.
Showcase validation for original explosion plants with placement-triggered and armed effects.
Showcase validation for original defense/support plants with damage, cover, upgrade and support checks.
Showcase validation for original special plants across placement, water, upgrade, air and wake contexts.
Validates that duplicate contributor ids are rejected by RegistryBase and surfaced as protocol issues.
Validates that extension packs cannot register contributor ids under the core.* namespace.
Validates that data_only extension packs cannot register trusted runtime contributors through the unified RegistryBase.
Validates extension detection, controller, trigger and effect contributors through RegistryBase dispatch plus source metadata and rebuild idempotency.
Validates that invalid extension trigger, detection and controller strategy scripts are rejected before registry entry activation.
Validates that DetectionRegistry initializes correctly after migration to RegistryBase with all 6 builtin detections.
Validates that ControllerRegistry initializes correctly after migration to RegistryBase with all 4 builtin controllers.
Validates that TriggerRegistry initializes correctly after migration to RegistryBase with all 6 builtin triggers.
Validates that all 4 visual registries (VisualCue, VisualFx, AudioCue, VisualProfile) initialize without protocol issues and contain core.* builtin entries.
Validates that the visual feedback system processes projectile.hit and entity.damaged events through the visual cue pipeline.
Validates that VisualStageLayerService creates layer hosts and VisualLayerPolicy provides z_index values for projectile projection.
Validates that entities can exist with optional visual profiles, no protocol.issue with scope visual_profiles is emitted, and placeholder core profiles are registered.
Validates that visual registries protect core.* namespace and reject bad registrations through guardrail checks.
Validates that new visual register kinds (visual_cues, visual_fx, audio_cues, visual_profiles) are accepted by ExtensionPackCatalog and battle runs normally.
Validates that the ignored local classic_original_assets pack can be explicitly enabled and consumed through VisualProfileRegistry.
Validates that migrated original plant archetypes mount private classic visual profiles when the local asset pack is enabled.
Validates that all 6 visual action types are wired and produce expected results when projectile.hit and entity.damaged events fire.
Validates that UIThemeProfile.default() loads correctly and theme fields are accessible.
Validates environment.core initialization and sunny natural sun generation.
Validates cloudy weather slows natural sun cadence and reduces natural sun value.
Validates harsh sun speeds natural sun cadence and increases natural sun value.
Validates night disables natural sun while preserving scripted sun_drop_entries.
Validates environment state registration and economy application through the mode module path.
Validates day environment liveness override for nocturnal entities.
Validates day environment sleep is applied before nocturnal instant on_place payloads fire.
Validates night environment wake path for nocturnal entities.
Validates discrete environment timeline changes and nocturnal synchronization.
Validates environment timeline changes apply before natural sun scheduling on the same tick.
Validates fog profile alpha grid generation.
Validates persistent clear source registration from Plantern.
Validates Blover fog clear request without losing air dispel behavior.
Validates fog visibility query and default detection compatibility.
Validates helm health layer routing and overflow into body health.
Validates shield health layer routing and layer destroyed signaling.
Validates attachment health layer absorb-only routing.
Validates bypass_layer_kinds shield policy across direct and projectile damage paths.
Validates Movement.core.walk command generation and integration.
Validates movement command merge order with status modifiers and impulses.
Validates Movement.core.leap_once height, airborne exposure, and landing state.
Validates movement liveness interrupt produces zero motion and pause reason.
Validates state side effects from health.layer_destroyed can set movement and exposure state.
Validates default damage target exposure only hits ground entities.
Validates explicit flying target exposure opt-in.
Validates hidden exposure states require explicit opt-in.
Validates dispel_flying filters by exposure and weight class.
Validates Original Basic Zombie archetype compilation, spawn, walk movement, and bite controller wiring.
Validates Original Flag Zombie archetype compilation, spawn, walk movement, and bite controller wiring.
Validates Original Conehead helm health layer and common zombie runtime wiring.
Validates Original Buckethead helm health layer and common zombie runtime wiring.
Validates Original Football Zombie fast walk and helmet layer.
Validates Original Screen Door shield layer and directional shield metadata tags.
Validates Original Newspaper shield destruction state transition and rage speed side effect.
Validates Original Pole Vaulter leap_once movement wiring.
Validates Original Ducky Tube water spawn tag and common zombie runtime wiring.
Validates Original Snorkel submerged exposure and hidden exposure hit filter behavior.
Validates Original Dolphin Rider leap_once movement wiring.
Validates Original Zomboni drive movement and crush controller wiring.
Validates Original Balloon attachment layer, flying exposure, and grounded side effect.
Validates Original Jack-in-the-Box periodic fuse and explode payload compilation.
Validates Original Digger tunnel movement, underground exposure, and helmet layer.
Validates Original Pogo hop_cycle movement wiring.
Validates Original Yeti flee state movement side effect.
Validates Original Bungee flying exposure and on-spawn drop damage payload compilation.
Validates Original Ladder attachment layer and fast walk wiring.
Validates Original Catapult periodic basketball projectile payload compilation.
Validates Original Dancing Zombie backup dancer summon effects.
Validates Original Backup Dancer archetype compilation and common zombie runtime wiring.
Validates Original Gargantuar crush controller and one-shot Imp throw threshold.
Validates Original Imp archetype compilation and fast walk wiring.
Validates Original Redeye Gargantuar health, crush controller, and one-shot Imp throw threshold.
Validates Original Zombies Batch A as a grouped content smoke: Basic, Flag, Conehead, Buckethead.
Validates Original Zombies Batch B as a grouped content smoke: Football, Screen Door, Newspaper, Pole Vaulter.
Validates Original Zombies Batch C as a grouped content smoke: Ducky Tube, Snorkel, Dolphin Rider, Zomboni.
Validates Original Zombies Batch D as a grouped content smoke for complex special zombies.
Validates Original Zombies Batch E as a grouped content smoke for summoners and giants.
